summary: Frontend UI testing completed for University Management module. All 10 features tested successfully: navigation to university detail, 3-column layout (Cursos/Evaluaciones/Preguntas), course selection showing evaluations, evaluation selection showing questions, create course modal, create evaluation modal, create question modal, AI generation dialog, delete buttons visible, and back navigation to universities list.
critical_code_review_comments: Added data-testid attributes to key buttons for better testability: add-course-btn, add-evaluation-btn, add-question-btn, ai-generate-btn, back-btn
All modals (Nuevo Curso, Nueva Evaluación, Nueva Pregunta, Generar Preguntas con IA) open and close correctly
3-column layout works correctly with responsive selection highlighting
LaTeX content displays in raw format in questions list - consider rendering with KaTeX/MathJax

features_tested.1_navigation_to_detail: PASS - Click on university card navigates to /admin/universities/{id}
features_tested.2_three_column_layout: PASS - Shows Cursos, Evaluaciones, Preguntas columns correctly
features_tested.3_course_selection_shows_evaluations: PASS - Selecting MAT1610 shows evaluation I1
features_tested.4_evaluation_selection_shows_questions: PASS - Selecting I1 shows 3 questions with LaTeX content
features_tested.5_create_course_modal: PASS - Opens 'Nuevo Curso' dialog with name, code, department fields
features_tested.6_create_evaluation_modal: PASS - Opens 'Nueva Evaluación' dialog with name, year, semester, description fields
features_tested.7_create_question_modal: PASS - Opens 'Nueva Pregunta' dialog with question, options A-D, answer, difficulty, solution, topic fields
features_tested.8_ai_generation_dialog: PASS - Opens 'Generar Preguntas con IA' dialog with number of questions and prompt textarea
features_tested.9_delete_buttons_visible: PASS - Delete buttons visible for courses, evaluations, and questions

context_for_next_testing_agent: University Management UI fully tested. All CRUD modals working. data-testid attributes added to key buttons for easier testing. Existing data: Universidad de Chile with MAT1610 course and I1 evaluation containing 3 questions.
